55162.description: Celebrated tennis coach, Patrick Mouratoglou speaks to CNBC's Tania Bryer about working with legendary player, Serena Williams, COVID-19's impact on the sport and the Black Lives Matter movement.

55163.title: Cnbc Conversation
55163.description: Co-founded one of the largest private equity firms in the world, James Coulter talks about the US-China trade spat and its impact on global investments.

55164.title: Managing Asia
55164.description: A look at what it takes to transform a business to become greener and ensure a more sustainable future. Christine Tan talks to CEOs from four companies in the region, YTL PowerSeraya, TAL Apparel, Banpu Public Company and Alliance Global.
